passiveAbilities.name: Stinger
passiveAbilities.description: If this character deals Piercing Melee Dmg, increase the Dmg dealt by +2.

activeAbilities.name: Antagonise
activeAbilities.description: Target gains +1 Melee Stat and +1 Evade Stat until end of turn.

activeAbilities.name: Out of Reach
activeAbilities.description: This character cannot be targeted by a Melee Attack action and does not benefit from cover until end of turn.

arcaneAbilities.name: Throw Javelin
arcaneAbilities.description:
Target suffers X Piercing Dmg.
Catastrophe: This character suffers 1 Wd.
